nasb.text: Husbands, love your wives, just as Christ also loved the church and gave Himself up for her,

esv.text: Husbands, love your wives, as Christ loved the church and gave himself up for her,

cnv.text: 你們作丈夫的，要愛妻子，好像基督愛教會，為教會捨己，

ccb.text: 做丈夫的要爱妻子，正如基督爱教会，为教会舍己，

csbs.text: 你们做丈夫的，要爱自己的妻子，就像基督也爱了教会，为她舍弃了自己。
